handoff.planSummary: Task 3 is a validation-focused task to verify the Todo List meets performance targets (<100ms load, <50ms operations), file size budget (<50KB), zero console errors, offline functionality, cross-browser compatibility (Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge), and accessibility standards (WCAG AA contrast, screen reader announcements). Primary implementation work is adding ARIA live regions for screen reader support; remainder is measurement and testing. No major architectural changes expected.

scope.rationale: Task 3 is primarily verification and measurement. Only anticipated code change is adding ARIA live regions for screen reader announcements - a localized, additive change that doesn't modify existing logic or architecture. All core functionality was implemented in Tasks 1 and 2.
